/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/illama_server.dir/server.cpp.o -o illama_server  libllama_wrapper.a libmodel_manager.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libbrotlicommon.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libbrotlienc.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libbrotlidec.dylib /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libz.tbd /opt/homebrew/lib/libssl.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libcrypto.dylib extern_llama/src/libllama.a extern_llama/ggml/src/libggml.a extern_llama/ggml/src/libggml-cpu.a extern_llama/ggml/src/ggml-blas/libggml-blas.a -framework Accelerate extern_llama/ggml/src/ggml-metal/libggml-metal.a extern_llama/ggml/src/libggml-base.a -lm -framework Foundation -framework Metal -framework MetalKit
